# AI Tool Adoption Survey — Item Draft

**Module title: AI Tool Use and Workload**

## Section A: Workload Impact

1. How often do you use AI tools in your teaching or research?
   (1 = never, 5 = very often)

2. How has your overall workload changed since your institution introduced
   AI tools?
   (1 = decreased substantially, 3 = no change, 5 = increased substantially)

3. How adequate is the institutional support you receive for incorporating
   AI tools into your work?
   (1 = not at all adequate, 5 = very adequate)

## Section B: Open Text

4. Please describe your experiences with AI tools in your teaching or
   research. Include positive, negative, or neutral experiences.

*Framing note: Item vocabulary excludes chapter argument terms (burden,
tension, mismatch, challenge) per study_protocol.md neutral-phrasing
requirement. Open-text item explicitly invites all valences.*
